allow: Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('pagination:', d.get\('pagination'\)\); print\('first card keys:', list\(d['data'][0].keys\(\)\) if d.get\('data'\) else 'no data'\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(type\(d\).__name__, list\(d.keys\(\)\) if isinstance\(d, dict\) else d[:2]\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(type\(d\).__name__, d.get\('pagination'\) if isinstance\(d, dict\) else f'list len={len\(d\)}'\)")

Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); sets=d['data'] if isinstance\(d,dict\) else d; [print\(s['reference'], s['date'], s['name_en']\) for s in sorted\(sets, key=lambda x: x['date'] or '', reverse=True\)[:8]]")

Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); sets=d['data'] if isinstance\(d,dict\) else d; print\(list\(sets[0].keys\(\)\)\); [print\(s['reference'], s.get\('name_en'\)\) for s in sets[:5]]")

Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); sets=d['data'] if isinstance\(d,dict\) else d; [print\(s['reference'], s.get\('date',''\), s.get\('name_en'\)\) for s in sorted\(sets, key=lambda x: x.get\('date'\) or '', reverse=True\)]")
